Parallel Evolution Analysis

Ali Movasati

Oct 27th, 2023

1 Introduction

In this document I will try to provide an overview of parallel evolution among different lines of each LTEE experiment. I’ll try to dissect the extent of parallelism in HIV-1 evolution and depict a detailed picture of its characteristics.

# read in the data
variants_ann <- read.table(file = "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/results/tables/2-p/all_annotated_variants.tsv.gz", 
sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)

# set correct data types
variants_ann$exp_line <- as.integer(variants_ann$exp_line)


# set host cell line info
variants_ann$host_line <- ifelse(variants_ann$exp_line %in% c("13", "14","17", "18", "19", "20"), "MT2", "MT4")


# account for the switched experimental lines
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 15 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "A"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 16 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "B"

variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "A"] <- "16"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "B"] <- "15"



variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 18 & variants_ann$passage > 350] <- "A"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 19 & variants_ann$passage > 350] <- "B"

variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "A"] <- "19"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "B"] <- "18"


# add a field containing pos, ref, and alt info of muts
variants_ann$mut_info <- paste(variants_ann$genomic_pos, variants_ann$ref_allele, variants_ann$alt_allele, sep = "_")

## EXPIII data

variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann[variants_ann$exp_line %in% 13:16,]
variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>%
                            mutate(exp_line = case_when(exp_line==13 ~ "MT2_1", exp_line==14 ~ "MT2_2", exp_line==15 ~ "MT4_1", exp_line==16 ~ "MT4_2"))

variants_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>% filter(!duplicated(variant_id))



## EXPIV data

variants_ann_expiv <- variants_ann[variants_ann$exp_line %in% 17:20,]
variants_ann_expiv <- variants_ann_expiv %>%
                            mutate(exp_line = case_when(exp_line==17 ~ "MT2_1", exp_line==18 ~ "MT2_2", exp_line==19 ~ "MT2_3", exp_line==20 ~ "MT2_4"))

variants_expiv <- variants_ann_expiv %>% filter(!duplicated(variant_id))

2 Overview

2.1 EXPIII

exp <- "EXPIII"
category <- "Majority"
threshold <- 0.5
end_passage <- 560

# keep majority mutations
variants_expiii %<>% 
                        filter(allele_freq >= threshold)


# uniqueness of majority mutations observed throughout the experiment
throughout_maj <- variants_expiii %>%
                        select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
                        distinct()


#table(as.numeric(table(par_whole$mut_info)))

# create a named vector from the df
muts <- throughout_maj$mut_info
names(muts) <- throughout_maj$exp_line

# convert named vector to list
muts <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)


# visualization
ggvenn(muts) +
        labs(title = paste0(category, " Mutations throughout the ", exp))+
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"))

# uniqueness of majority mutations present at the end passage
end_maj <- variants_expiii %>%
                        filter(passage == end_passage) %>%
                        select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
                        distinct()



#table(as.numeric(table(par$mut_info)))


# create a named vector from the df
muts <- end_maj$mut_info
names(muts) <- end_maj$exp_line

# convert named vector to list
muts <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)


# visualization
ggvenn(muts) +
        labs(title = paste0(category, " Mutations at passage #", end_passage))+
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"))

# get numbers for in-text reporting

a <- nrow(variants_expiii[variants_expiii$passage == end_passage,])
b <- length(unique(variants_expiii$mut_info[variants_expiii$passage == end_passage]))

We observe a total of 741 Majority mutations across the four evolution lines of EXP III (567 unique mutations) at passage 560.

2.2 EXPIV

exp <- "EXPIV"
category <- "Majority"
threshold <- 0.5
end_passage <- 510

# keep majority mutations
variants_expiv %<>% 
                        filter(allele_freq >= threshold)


# uniqueness of majority mutations observed throughout the experiment
throughout_maj <- variants_expiv %>%
                        select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
                        distinct()

nrow(throughout_maj)
#table(as.numeric(table(par_whole$mut_info)))

# create a named vector from the df
muts <- throughout_maj$mut_info
names(muts) <- throughout_maj$exp_line

# convert named vector to list
muts <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)


# visualization
ggvenn(muts) +
        labs(title = paste0(category, " Mutations throughout the ", exp))+
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"))

# uniqueness of majority mutations present at the end passage
end_maj <- variants_expiv %>%
                        filter(passage == end_passage) %>%
                        select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
                        distinct()



#table(as.numeric(table(par$mut_info)))


# create a named vector from the df
muts <- end_maj$mut_info
names(muts) <- end_maj$exp_line

# convert named vector to list
muts <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)


# visualization
ggvenn(muts) +
        labs(title = paste0(category, " Mutations at passage #", end_passage))+
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"))

2.3 MT2 of EXPIII and EXPIV

exp <- "EXPIII/IV"
category <- "Majority"
threshold <- 0.5
end_passage <- 510



variants_ann_all <- variants_ann %>%
                            mutate(exp_line = case_when(exp_line==13 ~ "III_MT2_1", exp_line==14 ~ "III_MT2_2", exp_line==15 ~ "III_MT4_1", exp_line==16 ~ "III_MT4_2",
                            exp_line==17 ~ "IV_MT2_1", exp_line==18 ~ "IV_MT2_2", exp_line==19 ~ "IV_MT2_3", exp_line==20 ~ "IV_MT2_4"))

variants_all <- variants_ann_all %>% filter(allele_freq >= threshold & str_detect(exp_line, pattern = "MT2"))



# uniqueness of majority mutations observed throughout the experiment
throughout_maj <- variants_all %>%
                        select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
                        distinct()


#table(as.numeric(table(par_whole$mut_info)))

# create a named vector from the df
muts <- throughout_maj$mut_info
names(muts) <- throughout_maj$exp_line

# convert named vector to list
muts <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)
# visualization
ggVennDiagram(muts) +
        labs(title = paste0(category, " Mutations throughout the ", exp))+
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"))

# uniqueness of majority mutations present at the end passage
end_maj <- variants_all %>%
                        filter(passage == end_passage) %>%
                        select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
                        distinct()



#table(as.numeric(table(par$mut_info)))


# create a named vector from the df
muts <- end_maj$mut_info
names(muts) <- end_maj$exp_line

# convert named vector to list
muts <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)


# visualization
ggVennDiagram(muts) +
        labs(title = paste0(category, " Mutations at passage #", end_passage))+
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"))
